basic_details.job_title: CBHFL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Cent Bank Home Finance Limited (CBHFL) has released the official Chief Financial Officer Notification 2026 on 06 June 2026 at www.cbhfl.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CBHFL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 45 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC) with a qualification of Chartered Accountant from a recognized institution and basic knowledge of computer applications, including Advanced Excel, can apply offline by 06 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 45 years (relaxation by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountant from recognized Institution. Basic Knowledge of computer applications including knowledge of Advance Excel.
qualification.details: Chartered Accountant from recognized Institution. Basic Knowledge of computer applications including knowledge of Advance Excel. Minimum experience of 15 years, including at least 3 years in a Senior Managerial Position in the field of finance, accounting, taxation, audit, and financial management, in Banks/Financial Institutions / NBFCs /Housing Finance Companies. Experience in Housing Finance / NBFC sector shall be preferred. Strong exposure to: Financial reporting (Ind AS), Regulatory compliance (NHB/RBI), Treasury & ALM management, Budgeting & financial planning, Taxation (Direct & Indirect – GST). Experience in dealing with: Statutory Auditors / Internal Auditors, Regulatory inspections (NHB/RBI/CAG). Management Trainee/Internship period will not be considered as count of experience.

salary_details.details: CTC offer to the selected candidate shall be determined based on the Candidates qualification, experience and current CTC form the existing Employer ensuring prudent and reasonable fit within the Company's compensation structure & Industry structure. Annual increment applicable as per Company's Policy.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cbhfl.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
